title: SpecRunnerCosts
description: Output of `spec-runner costs --json` (spec_runner.cli_info.cmd_costs). The per-task read surface that backs the spec-runner-vscode extension's TASKS tree. NOTE: `status` carries a MIXED vocabulary — DB states (pending/running/success/failed/skipped) for tasks that have run, tasks.md states (todo/in_progress/done/blocked) otherwise. Consumers must normalize both. See docs/state-schema.md.

status.description: Mixed vocabulary: DB status (has state) OR tasks.md status (no state). The union of both is pinned here; normalize on the consumer side.

cost.description: Cost in USD for this task (0.0 when no state)

input_tokens.description: Total input tokens for this task

output_tokens.description: Total output tokens for this task

total_input_tokens.description: Total input tokens across all tasks

total_output_tokens.description: Total output tokens across all tasks

avg_cost_per_completed.description: Average cost across tasks with cost > 0 (rounded to 2dp)

most_expensive_task.description: task_id of the costliest task, or null when none has cost > 0

budget_usd.description: Configured budget in USD; present only when a budget is set

budget_used_pct.description: Percentage of budget consumed; present only when a budget is set
